login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Welcome back

manager.label: Manager

parent.label: Parent

partner.label: Partner

staff.label: Staff

staff.sub: Manage the tasks assigned to your role within the campus.

admin.portalSub: Manage campuses, accounts and platform configuration.
admin.heading: Administration
admin.subheading: Sign in to access the management portal
admin.needHelp: Need help? Contact your system administrator.

public.needHelp: Need help? Contact your campus administrator.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.adminBody: To reset your password, please contact your system administrator. They can reset it from the admin dashboard.
forgot.publicBody: To reset your password, contact the administrator of your campus. They can reset it directly from their dashboard under your account.

logout.confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

password.requirements: Password must be at least 8 characters

session.expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

error.accountInactive: Your account is inactive. Please contact support.
error.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
